codeReview.summary: The missing-member planning/reporting implementation now fails closed when member-resolution prerequisites are unavailable, keeps `--existing-state-file` supplemental-only, and emits deterministic planned/apply skip artifacts with stable reason codes and affected surfaces.

summary: Reviewed the worker handoff, transcript skeleton, and resulting planning/apply code paths for `mm-importer-missing-member-planning-and-reporting` at commit `0bb291a`. Result: pass. The feature cleanly partitions resources/submissions/finals/provisionals into materialized vs. missing-member vs. explicit-skip buckets and preserves deterministic skipped-artifact output.
